title: Kelbor-Hal
specialty: Daemonic pacts · forbidden STC access · corruption of the Mechanicum
lore: Kelbor-Hal was the Fabricator-General of Mars at the time of the Horus Heresy — the most powerful figure in the Mechanicum, whose betrayal of the Emperor ranks among the worst treacheries of that dark age.

Horus offered Kelbor-Hal access to forbidden vaults of pre-Imperial technology sealed beneath the surface of Mars, knowledge so vast and dangerous that the Emperor himself had locked it away. Kelbor-Hal accepted, opening the vaults and unleashing the Chaos-tainted constructs within — igniting the Schism of Mars.

The resulting civil war devastated the Red Planet and split the Mechanicum in two. Kelbor-Hal and his followers fled to the Eye of Terror with the Traitor Legions, becoming the Dark Mechanicum — twisted tech-heretics who bind daemons into machines and practice the most forbidden techno-sorcery.
